description_long: This is a sturdy, rectangular wooden desk with a flat, broad work surface and a solid, minimalist design. The desk features three horizontal drawers on the right side, each with a black handle, providing ample storage for office supplies or documents. The left side is open, allowing for comfortable legroom, while the right side is fully enclosed by the drawer unit. The back and sides of the desk are plain, with no additional features or openings. The desk's finish is a uniform, matte brown, giving it a professional and understated appearance. Its robust construction suggests it is designed for durability and frequent use in a work or study environment.
description: A brown wooden desk with three black-handled drawers on the right and an open leg space on the left, featuring a flat, matte surface and a solid, minimalist build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three black-handled drawers on the right and open leg space on the left.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the solid, featureless side panel and the thickness of the desktop.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, unadorned back panel with angled legs visible at the bottom.
description_view_3: Left side view showing a solid panel with no drawers or openings.
attribute_orientation: The side with the three drawers and open leg space is intended to face the user, serving as the functional front of the desk.
